Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: textile materials by form [300231580], textile materials [300231565], fiber by product [300014062], fiber and fiber by product [300014023], materials by physical form [300247256], materials by form [300014611], materials (substances) [300010358], Materials (hierarchy name) [300010357], Materials Facet [300264091]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Generally, textile that is woven, felted, knit, pounded, or otherwise made into a flat piece. For textile in the form of continuous strands made from filaments of fiber by reeling, spinning, twisting, or throwing, see "yarn."

En general, textil tejido a telar, por enfieltrado, tejido a punto, machacado o transformado de otra manera en una pieza plana. Para textil en forma de hebras continuas fabricadas con filamentos de fibras mediante devanado, hilado, peinado o torcido, ver "hilo".

Textiel die is geweven, gevilt, gebreid, geknoopt, gevlochten, getwijnd, geklopt of op een andere manier tot een plat stuk gemaakt. Gebruik `garen' voor textiel in de vorm van doorlopende lange draden van fijne vezels door die te winden, te spinnen, te vlechten of te twisten.
通常指經紡織、製氈、編織、擊打或其他方法製成的扁平片狀物。以纖維細絲經繅絲、紡線、搓捻或搓絲形成連續線縷，並由此製成的紡織品，請見「紗線」。

Geralmente, têxteis que são tecidos, feltrados, tricotados, triturados ou feitos de outra forma em uma peça plana. Para têxteis na forma de fios contínuos feitos de filamentos de fibra por enrolamento, fiação, torção ou lançamento, consulte "fio".

Im allgemeinen eine Textilie, die gewebt, gefilzt, gestrickt, gewalkt oder auf andere Weise zu einem flachen Stück verarbeitet wird. Für Textilien in Form von durchgehenden Strängen die aus Faserfäden durch Spulen, Spinnen, Drehen oder Mulinieren hergestellt wird, siehe "Garn".

Source.Source_ID: 2000033721/Museum Prototype Project, Medium of Objects Frequency Report (1985)
